title: Senjata + Busana Melayu - CIT Pack
description: A version of the Senjata Melayu and Busana Melayu packs made compatible with the Custom Item Textures feature
body:
# Busana Melayu + Senjata Melayu - CIT Pack **Why was this pack created? / Kenapa pek ini dicipta?**
- This pack is created to help players who want to use Senjata Melayu's weaponary and Busana Melayu's attire without completely replacing the vanilla armor-and-weaponset
Pek ini dicipta untuk membantu pemain yang ingin menggunakan Senjata dan Busana Melayu tanpa menggantikan sepenuhnya set senjata dan zirah vanila - "Why?", you asked. Maybe you want to do a skit where one side is wearing these fancy Malay attires and weaponary while the other side is wearing the vanilla armory and weaponary. This pack will help you with that!
"Kenapa?", tanya kamu. Mungkin anda sedang ingin membuat sketsa di mana ada satu sisi yang memakai senjata dan busana Melayu dan ada satu sisi lain yang memakai zirah dan senjata vanila. Pek ini akan membantu anda! --- **Available Versions / Versi Tersedia**
Available for all versions which is compatible with the "Custom Item Texture" feature
Tersedia untuk semua versi yang serasi dengan ciri "Custom Item Textures"
| CIT Methods
Kaedah CIT | Additional Requisites
Keperluan Tambahan | 1.12.2 | 1.20.1 | 1.21.1 | 1.21.5+ | | --- | --- | :---: | :---: | :---: | :---: | | [OptiFine](https://optifine.net/home) | If using with Fabric, also use [OptiFabric](https://optifabric.com)\*
Jika digunakan dengan Fabric, tambahkan OptiFabric\* | ✔️ | ✔️ | ✔️ | **?** | [CIT Resewn (Fabric)](https://modrinth.com/mod/cit-resewn)** | - | ❌ | ✔️ | ✔️ | ❌ | | [CIT Resewn (Forge)](https://modrinth.com/mod/citreforged)** | - | ❌ | ✔️ | ❌ | ❌ | | CIT Resewn (NeoForge)** | [Fabric CIT Resewn](https://modrinth.com/mod/cit-resewn), [CITResewnNeoPatcher](https://modrinth.com/mod/cit-resewn-neopatcher),
[Sinytra Connector](https://modrinth.com/mod/connector), [Forgified Fabric API](https://modrinth.com/mod/forgified-fabric-api) | ❌ | ❌ | ✔️ | ❌ | | [Chime](https://modrinth.com/mod/chime) | - | ❌ | ✔️ | ❌ | ❌ | \* not recommended, use [Fabulously Optimized](https://download.fo) or [Forgeulously Optimized](https://modrinth.com/modpack/forgeulously-optimized) instead
tidak disyorkan, sila gunakan **Fabulously Optimized** atau **Forgeulously Optimized**
\** are already included in either of the modpacks mentioned above
sudah disertakan di dalam modpack-modpack yang tertera di atas To change the item, rename the weapon/armor of your choice in an anvil based on the following table
Untuk mengubah itemnya, namakan semula senjata/zirah pilihan anda menggunakan andas mengikut jadual berikut [**Table of Items**](https://mcedisimelayu.gitbook.io/wiki/english/senjata-+-busana-melayu-cit-pack/item-table) Note: You don't have to strictly follow the name inside the table. For example, "Nuru's Diamond Keris" will also work.
Catatan: Anda tak perlu ikut bulat-bulat nama di dalam jadual itu. Contohnya, "Ini Tengkolok Berlian Milik Nuru" juga diterima. ---
Check out other MCEM packs! / Jom tengok pek MCEM lainnya!
